name: ThemeSpec

aliases.name: ThemeSpecColor
aliases.type: { base : Color.Color, light : Color.Color, contrast : Color.Color }

aliases.name: ThemeSpecColorVars
aliases.type: { base : String.String, baseChannels : String.String, light : String.String, lightChannels : String.String, contrast : String.String, contrastChannels : String.String }

aliases.name: ThemeSpecData
aliases.type: { fonts : { title : String.String, text : String.String, code : String.String }, colors : { background : ThemeSpec.ThemeSpecColor, baseline : ThemeSpec.ThemeSpecColor, primary : ThemeSpec.ThemeSpecColor, secondary : ThemeSpec.ThemeSpecColor, success : ThemeSpec.ThemeSpecColor, warning : ThemeSpec.ThemeSpecColor, danger : ThemeSpec.ThemeSpecColor } }

values.name: sample
values.comment: Renders an element that showcases all the current theme's colors and settings.
